description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OpenWISP Network Topology CI Build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to test multiple Python and Django versions on ubuntu-20.04, checking out the code, setting up Python, installing dependencies, running QA checks and tests with coverage, and uploading coverage reports to Coveralls. Have a separate job to finalize the Coveralls report on ubuntu-latest.
